_comment: Gold = the atomic claims a COMPLETE extraction of THIS report should recover. Coverage/recall measures extraction completeness (did we find them), NOT correctness (whether the report's figures are right — that is the hallucination score). So gold mirrors the report's own assertions, including its erroneous net income ($210M) and EPS ($1.05).

claims.text: Total revenue for Q3 FY2024 was $1,250 million.
Total revenue for Q3 FY2023 was $1,000 million.
Gross profit for Q3 FY2024 was $500 million.
Gross margin for Q3 FY2024 was 40%.
Operating income for Q3 FY2024 was $200 million.
